creative_brief.tone: friendly, accessible, and functional with a touch of Scandinavian minimalism
creative_brief.visual_style: Clean, airy, and modern visuals that emphasize the product's integration into different home environments; use real-life settings with diverse models and relatable scenarios
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Utilize storytelling that highlights real-life applications and versatility in different living spaces, leveraging digital platforms and social media for broader reach
creative_brief.emotion: practical satisfaction, inspiration, and a sense of order
creative_brief.typography_style: IKEA's signature bold, sans-serif typeface for clarity and brand consistency
creative_brief.color_scheme: natural wood tones, crisp white, and IKEA blue/yellow branding

creative_brief.ad_style: Utilize storytelling that highlights real-life applications and versatility in different living spaces, leveraging digital platforms and social media for broader reach
